/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/datagen.dir/datagen_batch_new.cpp.o CMakeFiles/datagen.dir/configLoader.cpp.o -o datagen   -L/home/ttekdogan/Desktop/nes/benchmark-framework/datagen/include/mosquitto-2.0.21/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ttekdogan/Desktop/nes/benchmark-framework/datagen/include/mosquitto-2.0.21/lib -lpthread -lyaml-cpp -lmosquitto
